task: v138 authorization_rule candidate confirmation and undo

current_state.head: 8db0ed7 feat: 增加应用别名确认固化 0.132.0
current_state.previous_stage: application alias confirmation writes config/apps.local.json aliases and supports undo

similar_implementations.evidence: src/jarvis_lite/contacts.py centralizes config/contacts.local.json parsing, save, remove and count; memory_config_candidates confirms/undoes it.
src/jarvis_lite/app_registry.py provides parse_app_alias_candidate(), save_app_alias() and remove_app_alias(); /app-find observes the persisted alias.
src/jarvis_lite/authorization.py exposes describe_authorization_status() and tests assert the first-stage policy boundaries.

design_direction.scope: Add explicit confirmation and undo for authorization_rule candidates as an auditable local config record.
design_direction.storage: config/authorization.local.json with a rules list; records contain rule text, source, created_at and updated_at.
design_direction.observable_effect: /authorization-status and /config-manager-status show local authorization rule count and rule text.
non_goals: Do not add /config-candidate-confirm or /config-candidate-undo to the LLM command whitelist.
Do not let ordinary chat or LLM fallback write authorization rules.
Do not change existing command execution decisions in this first stage.
Do not click, type, focus windows or launch apps.
